phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Chá das Relíquias
phrases.text_local: Você sabe onde fica o Chá das Relíquias?
phrases.pronunciation: voh-SEH SAH-bih OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW SHAH DUHSH reh-LEE-keeuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Often crowded in peak season, it is best to visit early to secure a table near the historic site.

likely_response.local: Pergunte no balcão de informações turísticas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the tourist information desk.

responses.english: Ask at the tourist information desk.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte no balcão de informações turísticas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Confeitura do Castelo
phrases.text_local: Qual é o caminho mais rápido para chegar à Confeitura do Castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW kuh-MEE-nyoo MEYESH RAH-pee-doo PUH-ruh shih-GAHR AH koong-fay-TOO-ruh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: The pastry shop is iconic for its castle-themed travesseiros and direct proximity to the historic fortress.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Confeitura do Castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH koong-fay-TOO-ruh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Confeitura do Castelo.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Confeitura do Castelo.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH koong-fay-TOO-ruh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Confeitura do Castelo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Chá das Relíquias is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Chá das Relíquias?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SHAH DUHSH reh-LEE-keeuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals often refer to it simply as Chá das Relíquias, a historic tea house near the national palace.

likely_response.local: Pergunte no balcão de informações turísticas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the tourist information desk.

responses.english: Ask at the tourist information desk.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte no balcão de informações turísticas.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver as chaminés do Palácio Nacional?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR UHSH shuh-mee-NEHSH DOO puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira do Palácio Nacional; os bilheteiros podem indicar a localização exata das chaminés.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL; OOSH bee-lyih-TAY-roosh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh DUHSH shuh-mee-NEHSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Palácio Nacional ticket office; the ticket sellers can indicate the exact location of the chimneys.

responses.english: Go to the Palácio Nacional ticket office; the ticket sellers can indicate the exact location of the chimneys.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL; OOSH bee-lyih-TAY-roosh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh DUHSH shuh-mee-NEHSH.
responses.french: Dirija-se à bilheteira do Palácio Nacional; os bilheteiros podem indicar a localização exata das chaminés.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fonte Mourisca is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar-me a localização exata da Fonte Mourisca?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR-MIH AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh DUH FOHNG-tih moow-REESH-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: This Moorish-style fountain is a hidden architectural gem within the palace grounds.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira do Palácio Nacional.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office of the National Palace.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office of the National Palace.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL.
responses.french: Pergunte na bilheteira do Palácio Nacional.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Miradouro da Portela is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro da Portela?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH poo-ruh-TEH-luh?
phrases.cultural_note: A traditional viewpoint offering panoramic views of the historic center and the palace.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro da Portela.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH poo-ruh-TEH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Miradouro da Portela.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Miradouro da Portela.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH poo-ruh-TEH-luh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro da Portela.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Chá das Relíquias
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica o Chá das Relíquias?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW SHAH DUHSH reh-LEE-keeuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Chá das Relíquias is a historic tea house in Sintra, known for its traditional pastries and cozy atmosphere. Rua da Ferraria is a narrow cobblestone street in the historic center.

likely_response.local: Na Rua da Ferraria, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ROOUH DUH feh-ruh-REEUH, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: On Rua da Ferraria, on the right.

responses.english: On Rua da Ferraria, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NUH ROOUH DUH feh-ruh-REEUH, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Na Rua da Ferraria, à direita.
